name: Section 80C tax benefit computation
description: User asks about 80C deduction on life insurance premium — needs accurate computation

input.message: I pay ₹80,000 annual premium on my LIC policy. I also have PPF of ₹50,000 per year. My income is ₹20 lakhs. How much 80C deduction will I get and how much tax will I save?

notes: 80C cap = ₹1.5L. PPF ₹50K + LIC ₹80K = ₹1.3L (under cap). Full ₹1.3L deductible. At 30% bracket + surcharge: ~₹40K tax saved. Must mention new regime has no 80C benefit.
